hero.headline: Launch your landing page in
hero.description: Modern landing pages designed to convert visitors into clients. Get your business online fast with a professional page that looks great on any device.

whatWeDo.label: What We Do
whatWeDo.headline: Professional landing pages, delivered fast
whatWeDo.description: We build clean, modern landing pages for businesses that want to look professional online without the hassle of traditional web development. No complicated processes, no long wait times—just a great page that works.

perfectFor.label: Perfect For
perfectFor.headline: Built for businesses like yours
perfectFor.description: Our landing pages are designed for local businesses and personal brands that need a professional online presence without the complexity.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: Showcase your menu, location, and hours

localServices.title: Local Services
localServices.description: Present your services to local customers

process.label: How It Works
process.headline: From idea to live in 4 simple steps

understand.title: Tell Us About Your Business
understand.description: Share your business details, brand style, and what you want visitors to do. We'll handle the rest.

design.title: We Design Your Page
design.description: Our team creates a clean, modern design that matches your brand and speaks to your customers.

build.title: Review & Refine
build.description: You review the draft and request any changes. We refine until you're completely satisfied.

improve.title: Launch & Go Live
improve.description: Your landing page goes live and starts working for your business immediately.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include mobile-responsive design and fast delivery.

addons.label: Add-ons
addons.headline: Enhance your landing page
addons.description: Optional extras to make your page even better.

extraLanguage.title: Extra Language
extraLanguage.description: Add Spanish or another language version

menuPdf.title: Menu PDF Integration
menuPdf.description: Upload and display your menu as a PDF

speed.question: How fast can my landing page be ready?
speed.answer: Depending on your plan, your landing page can be ready in as little as 24 hours. Our Starter plan delivers in 48 hours, Business in 24 hours, and Professional offers same-day delivery.

domain.question: Do I need to have a domain?
domain.answer: Not necessarily. We can help you purchase and set up a domain, or we can deploy your page on a subdomain if you prefer. We'll guide you through the options.

changes.question: Can I request changes after delivery?
changes.answer: Yes! All plans include one round of revisions. If you need additional changes after that, we offer affordable update packages.

languages.question: Can my website be in two languages?
languages.answer: Absolutely! You can add additional language versions as an add-on. This is especially popular for businesses serving both English and Spanish-speaking customers.

hosting.question: Do you host the website?
hosting.answer: Yes, we handle hosting on fast, reliable servers. Your landing page will load quickly and stay online 24/7. Hosting is included for the first year with all plans.

cta.headline: Ready to launch your landing page?
cta.description: Get your business online today. No complicated processes, no long wait times—just a professional page that converts visitors into customers.
